task_completion.description: Open the corrupt T8 housing bracket model in FreeCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD application open with a 3D model of a bracket loaded. The model should initially appear as a shell with a visibly missing face or gap.
The workbench dropdown menu at the top of the FreeCAD interface displays 'Part', indicating the Part Workbench is active.

task_completion.description: Create a face to fill the missing gap in the geometry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the use of face-creation tools (e.g., 'Make face from wires' or advanced utility shapes) and the 3D view shows the previously open gap in the bracket is now visually covered/filled by a new face.

task_completion.description: Create a valid, closed Solid from the repaired shell.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tree View on the left shows a new 'Solid' object has been created, or screenshots show the agent using the 'Convert to solid' tool from the Part menu.

task_completion.description: Save the repaired model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the directory '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' and the filename 'repaired_bracket.FCStd', or the FreeCAD window title bar updates to show 'repaired_bracket.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to perform the repair.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, menu navigation, and tool selection within the FreeCAD GUI, rather than just executing a terminal command or Python script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actively repaired the geometry rather than loading a pre-existing solved file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tree View shows a history of operations (e.g., faces created, shells constructed, solid conversion) rather than just a single imported solid object appearing instantly.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using FreeCAD's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save operation is performed through FreeCAD's 'File -> Save As' menu, ensuring a genuine .FCStd file is produced rather than a renamed text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The verified expected output path for the repaired model is /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/repaired_bracket.FCStd.
